_note: Horizon in-game confirmations & corrections, layered on top of the PDF base data at load time. Base files (skillchains/weapons/summons.json) stay pristine PDF truth; everything Horizon-verified accumulates here.

_schema.weaponSkillProperties: object: 'Weapon Skill Name' -> [property tokens]. Overrides that WS's properties entirely (e.g. Horizon gives it different attributes).
_schema.comboOverrides: array of { open, close, chain, note }. Changes/adds a property combination. chain=null means this ordered pair does NOT skillchain on Horizon.
_schema.pairConfirmations: array of { a, b, result, status, note }. Empirical WS-pair results tested in-game. status: 'confirmed' | 'fizzles' | 'different'. 'a' opens, 'b' closes.
